MERGE (cve_45866:CVE {id:'CVE-2023-45866'})
ON CREATE SET
  cve_45866.summary = 'Critical Bluetooth protocol implementation issue enabling keystroke injection by tricking the Bluetooth host state-machine into pairing with a fake/emulated keyboard without user confirmation; attacker can then inject keystrokes on macOS, iOS, Android, and Linux devices as if a legitimate Bluetooth keyboard were attached.'
ON MATCH SET
  cve_45866.summary = CASE
    WHEN (cve_45866.summary IS NULL OR trim(cve_45866.summary) = '') THEN 'Critical Bluetooth protocol implementation issue enabling keystroke injection by tricking the Bluetooth host state-machine into pairing with a fake/emulated keyboard without user confirmation; attacker can then inject keystrokes on macOS, iOS, Android, and Linux devices as if a legitimate Bluetooth keyboard were attached.'
    ELSE cve_45866.summary
  END

ON CREATE SET

ON MATCH SET
  tool_python.summary = CASE
    WHEN (tool_python.summary IS NULL OR trim(tool_python.summary) = '') THEN 'Used to implement an emulated Bluetooth keyboard via a Python script running on a Linux computer for keystroke injection.'
    ELSE tool_python.summary
  END

ON CREATE SET
  inc_45866.type = 'intrusion',
  inc_45866.summary = 'Attackers can exploit CVE-2023-45866 (Bluetooth protocol implementation flaw) to pair an emulated/fake Bluetooth keyboard without user confirmation and inject keystrokes to control macOS, iOS, Android, and Linux devices remotely.'
ON MATCH SET
  inc_45866.type = CASE WHEN (inc_45866.type IS NULL OR trim(inc_45866.type) = '') THEN 'intrusion' ELSE inc_45866.type END,
  inc_45866.summary = CASE WHEN (inc_45866.summary IS NULL OR trim(inc_45866.summary) = '') THEN 'Attackers can exploit CVE-2023-45866 (Bluetooth protocol implementation flaw) to pair an emulated/fake Bluetooth keyboard without user confirmation and inject keystrokes to control macOS, iOS, Android, and Linux devices remotely.' ELSE inc_45866.summary END

  rel_tech1.evidence = 'It works by tricking the Bluetooth host state-machine into pairing with a fake keyboard without user confirmation.'
ON MATCH SET

  rel_tech2.details = CASE WHEN (rel_tech2.details IS NULL OR trim(rel_tech2.details) = '') THEN 'Keystroke injection/control by pairing an emulated Bluetooth keyboard and injecting keystrokes as if a legitimate keyboard were attached.' ELSE rel_tech2.details END,

ON MATCH SET taLumma.summary = coalesce(taLumma.summary, 'Malware name represented as ThreatActor node only to support alias relation; primary artifact is Malware:Lumma Stealer.')
MERGE (taRecord:ThreatActor {name:'RecordBreaker'})
ON CREATE SET taRecord.summary = 'Malware name represented as ThreatActor node only to support alias relation; primary artifact is Malware:RecordBreaker.'
ON MATCH SET taRecord.summary = coalesce(taRecord.summary, 'Malware name represented as ThreatActor node only to support alias relation; primary artifact is Malware:RecordBreaker.')
MERGE (taLumma)-[ral1:has_alias]->(taAlias1)
ON CREATE SET ral1.date = date('2023-01-01')
ON MATCH SET ral1.date = coalesce(ral1.date, date('2023-01-01'))
MERGE (taRecord)-[ral2:has_alias]->(taAlias2)
ON CREATE SET ral2.date = date('2023-01-01')
ON MATCH SET ral2.date = coalesce(ral2.date, date('2023-01-01'))
WITH src1, mal1

// Create month Date nodes for detection spike context
MERGE (d202310:Date {value: date('2023-10-01')})
MERGE (d202311:Date {value: date('2023-11-01')})

// Incident capturing telemetry spike (analytics hub)
MERGE (inc1:Incident {id:'eset-rugmi-detections-spike-2023-10-11'})
ON CREATE SET
  inc1.date = date('2023-10-01'),
  inc1.type = 'malware',
  inc1.summary = 'ESET telemetry observed detections for Rugmi loader spiking in October and November 2023, surging from single digit daily numbers to hundreds per day.'
ON MATCH SET
  inc1.date = coalesce(inc1.date, date('2023-10-01')),
  inc1.type = coalesce(inc1.type, 'malware'),
  inc1.summary = coalesce(inc1.summary, 'ESET telemetry observed detections for Rugmi loader spiking in October and November 2023, surging from single digit daily numbers to hundreds per day.')
MERGE (inc1)-[rim1:involved_malware]->(mal1)
ON CREATE SET rim1.evidence = 'Telemetry data shows detections for the Rugmi loader spiked in October and November 2023.', rim1.source_id = src1.id
ON MATCH SET
  rim1.evidence = coalesce(rim1.evidence, 'Telemetry data shows detections for the Rugmi loader spiked in October and November 2023.'),
  rim1.source_id = coalesce(rim1.source_id, src1.id)
MERGE (inc1)-[ron1:occurred_on]->(d202310)
ON CREATE SET ron1.date = date('2023-10-01')
ON MATCH SET ron1.date = coalesce(ron1.date, date('2023-10-01'))
MERGE (inc1)-[ron2:occurred_on]->(d202311)
ON CREATE SET ron2.date = date('2023-11-01')
ON MATCH SET ron2.date = coalesce(ron2.date, date('2023-11-01'))
MERGE (inc1)-[sup1:supported_by]->(src1)
ON CREATE SET sup1.quote = 'Detections for the Rugmi loader spiked in October and November 2023, surging from single digit daily numbers to hundreds per day.'
ON MATCH SET sup1.quote = coalesce(sup1.quote, 'Detections for the Rugmi loader spiked in October and November 2023, surging from single digit daily numbers to hundreds per day.')
WITH src1

// Capture MaaS business model as Capability leveraged by stealers (generic, evidence-backed)
MERGE (cap1:Capability {name:'Automation'})
ON CREATE SET cap1.summary = 'Automation-enabled delivery and subscription distribution models (e.g., malware-as-a-service).'
ON MATCH SET cap1.summary = coalesce(cap1.summary, 'Automation-enabled delivery and subscription distribution models (e.g., malware-as-a-service).')
MERGE (inc2:Incident {id:'stealer-maas-subscription-model'})
ON CREATE SET
  inc2.date = date('2023-01-01'),
  inc2.type = 'malware',
  inc2.summary = 'Stealer malware is typically sold under a malware-as-a-service (MaaS) model to other threat actors on a subscription basis; Lumma Stealer advertised from $250/month with higher tiers up to $20,000 including source code and resale rights.'
ON MATCH SET
  inc2.date = coalesce(inc2.date, date('2023-01-01')),
  inc2.type = coalesce(inc2.type, 'malware'),
  inc2.summary = coalesce(inc2.summary, 'Stealer malware is typically sold under a malware-as-a-service (MaaS) model to other threat actors on a subscription basis; Lumma Stealer advertised from $250/month with higher tiers up to $20,000 including source code and resale rights.')
MERGE (malLumma2:Malware {name:'Lumma Stealer'})
ON MATCH SET malLumma2.family = coalesce(malLumma2.family, 'Information Stealer')
MERGE (inc2)-[rim2:involved_malware]->(malLumma2)
ON CREATE SET rim2.evidence = 'Stealer malware is typically sold under a MaaS subscription model; Lumma Stealer advertised for $250/month; most expensive plan costs $20,000 and includes source code and resale rights.', rim2.source_id = src1.id
ON MATCH SET
  rim2.evidence = coalesce(rim2.evidence, 'Stealer malware is typically sold under a MaaS subscription model; Lumma Stealer advertised for $250/month; most expensive plan costs $20,000 and includes source code and resale rights.'),
  rim2.source_id = coalesce(rim2.source_id, src1.id)
MERGE (inc2)-[lev1:leverages]->(cap1)
ON CREATE SET lev1.details = 'MaaS subscription-based distribution for stealer malware (example pricing: $250/month; up to $20,000 for source code and resale rights).', lev1.evidence = 'Stealer malware is typically sold under a malware-as-a-service (MaaS) model on a subscription basis; Lumma Stealer advertised from $250/month.', lev1.source_id = src1.id
ON MATCH SET
  lev1.details = coalesce(lev1.details, 'MaaS subscription-based distribution for stealer malware (example pricing: $250/month; up to $20,000 for source code and resale rights).'),
  lev1.evidence = coalesce(lev1.evidence, 'Stealer malware is typically sold under a malware-as-a-service (MaaS) model on a subscription basis; Lumma Stealer advertised from $250/month.'),
  lev1.source_id = coalesce(lev1.source_id, src1.id)
MERGE (inc2)-[sup2:supported_by]->(src1)
ON CREATE SET sup2.quote = 'Stealer malware is typically sold under a malware-as-a-service (MaaS) model to other threat actors on a subscription basis. Lumma Stealer ... is advertised ... for $250 a month ... most expensive plan costs $20,000 ... access to the source code and the right to sell it.'
ON MATCH SET sup2.quote = coalesce(sup2.quote, 'Stealer malware is typically sold under a malware-as-a-service (MaaS) model to other threat actors on a subscription basis. Lumma Stealer ... is advertised ... for $250 a month ... most expensive plan costs $20,000 ... access to the source code and the right to sell it.');
